chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 704 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.2920/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 19.12.2023 Mr. Qurban Ali Malano, Advocate for petitioner. M/s Ahmed Ali Ghumro and Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocates for respondent No.5. Mr. Zuber Ahmed Rajput, Advocate for respondents-NHA. Mr. Muhammad Aslam Jatoi, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This is a part-heard matter, but learned Counsel for NHA submits that grievance of the petitioner has been redressed. Learned Counsel for petitioner, in view of statement of learned Counsel for NHA, having been satisfied, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
